'''Ratter thists''', also known as '''Kordulian Krisses''' or simply '''Krisses''', were small and agile furry creatures with striped tan fur and retractable claws. They were sometimes kept as pets, and were used to guard livestock in [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] valleys. They were native to [[Kordu]] and could also be found on [[Eislomi III|Eislo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
